description_long: This object is a rustic, elongated loaf of bread with a pointed tip and a thick, uneven crust. The surface is golden-brown with darker, almost charred markings, especially on one side, suggesting it was baked in a traditional oven. One side features a series of deep, parallel slashes and rectangular cutouts, possibly for decorative or functional scoring. The crust appears rough and textured, with a matte finish and some areas darker than others, indicating a well-baked exterior. The loaf is unsliced and solid, with no visible packaging or branding. Its overall appearance suggests an artisanal or homemade style, suitable for display in a bakery or urban food market.
description: A rustic, pointed loaf of bread with a thick, rough golden-brown crust and deep, dark scoring marks. The surface is uneven and matte, with no visible packaging or branding.
description_view_0: The side view shows the pointed tip and the thick, rough crust with some dark, charred areas.
description_view_1: This view highlights the deep, parallel slashes and rectangular cutouts on the bread's surface, showing the most detail.
description_view_2: A broad side of the loaf is visible, with a few rectangular marks and a more uniform golden-brown color.
description_view_3: The opposite side is mostly plain, with a dark, rough crust and minimal markings.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is thick, rough, and uneven, with deep parallel slashes and rectangular cutouts on one side. There are darker, almost charred areas, giving it a rustic, artisanal appearance.
